$comment: v0 tuning — villager Arms track (VILLAGER-AND-GODHEAD-SPEC Part I). All numbers are the spec's first guesses. XP curve: level n is reached at curveConstant * n^2 total XP (L2 at 100, L10 at 2500), clamped 1..maxLevel. distressedExpressions: the spec says 'slacking/fearful'; this codebase's expression set (tuning/disposition.json) has no 'fearful' — resolved as every non-steady expression (a distressed villager trains badly, whatever shape the distress takes). equipmentSlots: deliberately the game's existing 3-slot doll (item.schema.json slots), not the spec's 6 — reviewer-approved deviation; grow this list when the doll grows.
